key.name: account-jid
key.summary: JMP/XMPP JID for the active account

key.name: xmpp-host
key.summary: Optional explicit XMPP host override (else derived from JID domain)

key.name: gateway-domain
key.summary: JID domain of the PSTN gateway used to encode and decode phone numbers

key.name: default-country
key.summary: ISO country code used by libphonenumber when parsing local-form numbers

key.name: push-distributor
key.summary: D-Bus name of the currently-bound UnifiedPush distributor (empty = none)

key.name: push-endpoint
key.summary: Last UnifiedPush endpoint URL registered with the server

key.name: resource-id
key.summary: Per-install XMPP resource suffix (generated on first connect)
